# API Reference

Auto-generated documentation from source docstrings for the public xyzrender API.

- [Core API](api/core.rst) — `load`, `render`, `render_gif`, `orient`, `measure`, and the `Molecule` container
- [Types Reference](api/types.rst) — `RenderConfig` and all associated dataclasses
- [Config Reference](api/config.rst) — `build_config` for programmatic preset construction

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:hidden:

api/core
api/types
api/config
```
